attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_CURRENCIES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.CURRENCY_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.PRECISION_V, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.EXTENDED_PRECISION, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.SYMBOL, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.MINIMUM_ACCOUNTABLE_UNIT, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.CONTEXT, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ISO_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.DERIVE_EFFECTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.DERIVE_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.DERIVE_FACTOR, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES,
(
 select CURRENCY_CODE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES
 minus
 select CURRENCY_CODE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_CURRENCIES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CURRENCY_CODE = STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.CURRENCY_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES.REFRESH_DATETIME
